title: Grasped
description: The first company I created with two friends. We are working hard to create a mobile app on the side of our full-time jobs, and we expect to launch the beta version of the app around the end of 2022. Brand guidelines, prototyping in Figma, back-end development and the creation of the app using the Ionic framework are some of my responsabilities in this project
medium: UX Design, Full-Stack & Mobile App Development
imageAlt: Mobile application interface prototypes for Grasped
